backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, UserSettings, Experience), state maps, and query/update methods for experiences and user settings, with access control and blob storage mixins applied.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: guarding the Settings page and the useAccountSettings hook against unauthenticated backend calls, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Dini.Verse app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider, TranslationProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: Card component that displays a 'Login Required' message with Log In and Sign Up navigation buttons for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Header authentication buttons component that shows Login/Sign Up buttons when logged out, a Logout button when authenticated, and a loading spinner during auth state resolution.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: Authentication guard component that renders children for authenticated users and shows a login/sign-up prompt card for unauthenticated users, with a loading spinner during auth resolution.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Renders the 2D builder canvas with interactive drag-and-drop and corner-handle resizing for placed elements, updating element positions and dimensions via the builder hook.
Provides a file input button that reads a user-selected image file and adds it as a decal to the builder canvas.
Displays controls for the selected canvas element to bring it forward, send it backward, or delete it.
Shows a properties panel with sliders and color inputs for editing the selected element's position, opacity, rotation, color, and dimensions.
Manages saving, loading, deleting, exporting, and importing named canvas prop presets using the useBuilder2DProps hook, with dialogs for export/import data.
Renders buttons to add rectangle, circle, or triangle shapes to the builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: Renders a follow/unfollow button for a creator's principal, handling authentication checks and toggling follow state via social following hooks.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays a card for a single experience with its thumbnail, title, description, and creator name, navigating to the experience detail page on click.
Renders a responsive grid of ExperienceCard components with skeleton loading states and an empty-state message.
Provides thumbs-up and thumbs-down rating buttons for an experience, displaying current counts and requiring authentication to submit a rating.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: A fixed in-game menu button that opens dialogs for leaving the game, resetting the character (with confirmation), and accessing a placeholder settings panel.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: A dialog form for publishing a new experience, collecting title, description, category, gameplay controls, and an optional thumbnail, then submitting via the createExperience mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that composes the site header, left sidebar, main content outlet, and site footer into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: A static informational banner alerting users that on-platform authentication is now available and that external login redirects remain disabled.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: A responsive left navigation sidebar with links to Profile, Social, Inventory, Groups, and Settings, using translated labels and active-link highlighting.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: A simple site footer displaying the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: A sticky top header with the site logo, primary navigation links, auth buttons, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user's profile card with their avatar, display name, and quick-action buttons to Discover or Publish an Experience.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: A panel listing all creators the current user follows, with the ability to unfollow each one; each creator's profile is fetched individually for display.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: React component that provides a friends management UI, including searching for users, sending/accepting/declining friend requests, and unfriending, using social and profile hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: React component that renders a two-panel messaging UI allowing users to search for other users, select a recipient, view message history, and send messages.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: Placeholder React component displaying a 'Party System Coming Soon' message with a card layout; no functional logic implemented.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: React context provider that supplies a translation function `t` based on the user's language setting, with fallback to English for missing keys.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for reading and mutating user account settings (display name, avatar, visibility, language, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Custom hook managing state for a 2D canvas builder, providing operations to add, select, update, delete, reorder, and clear shape or decal elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Custom hook for persisting and managing saved 2D builder prop configurations in localStorage, with save, delete, export, and import operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Thin wrapper hook that exposes the current user, authentication status, and loading state from `useSessionAuth`.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, filtering, creating, and rating experiences via the backend actor, with several mutations stubbed out as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Consolidates React Query hooks for user profiles and experiences (fetch, search, create, rate) into a single file, with several mutations stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Provides session-token-based authentication hooks (login, signup, logout) with temporary mock implementations, pending real backend session methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for a creator-following system (follow, unfollow, follower count, is-following) that are all disabled or stubbed until backend support is added.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for a friends system (list friends, pending requests, send/respond to requests, unfriend) with all mutations throwing not-implemented errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for fetching and sending direct messages between principals, with the send mutation stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Single placeholder hook for fetching the current party, disabled and returning null until backend party methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Thin re-export hook that returns the translation context from TranslationContext.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Placeholder React Query hook for searching users by term, currently disabled and returning an empty array until backend session-based user search is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, but all queries are disabled and mutations throw errors pending backend session auth implementation.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Exports a translations object containing English UI strings organized by feature area (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Outfit font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Placeholder page displaying avatar shop category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium Items, Animations) with a 'Coming Soon' message and a disabled browse button.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Landing page for the Create section that presents two navigation cards: one for the 2D Games Builder and one for the UGC Accessories creator.
Full-page 2D game builder UI composed of a shape palette, decal uploader, layer controls, a canvas, and a properties/props panel, all wired through the useBuilder2D hook.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator that displays a 'Coming Soon' message with a back-navigation button to the Create landing page.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Page displaying the Dini Bucks virtual currency system, showing the user's balance (if authenticated) and informational cards about earning, spending, trading, and premium access.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Page for browsing and searching experiences, with tabs for trending categories and an option for authenticated users to publish new experiences.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Detail page for a single experience showing its thumbnail, creator info, rating controls, and a play button that simulates launching the experience for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder page for the Groups feature, displaying an empty state card indicating the user has not joined any groups yet.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page showing a personalized welcome card for authenticated users, a grid of recommended experiences, and a friend activity sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder page for the user's inventory, displaying an empty state card directing users to the Avatar Shop.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with a username/password form that calls the session auth hook and redirects to home on success, with a link to the signup page.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page with avatar, display name, username, and buttons to edit profile or navigate to settings. Wrapped in RequireProfile to enforce authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Full-featured settings page allowing authenticated users to update display name, avatar, visibility, language, theme, and delete their account, with a login prompt shown to unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up form page that collects username, display name, password, and confirmation, validates inputs, and calls the session auth signup method before redirecting to home.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social hub page with tabbed navigation for Friends, Messages, Parties, and Following panels; redirects unauthenticated users to an accounts-disabled notice.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes any thrown value (Error objects, strings, plain objects, backend trap errors) into a human-readable English string for display in the UI.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides get, set, and clear helpers for persisting a session token string in localStorage under a fixed key.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, registers typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and defines a custom design token system using OKLCH CSS variables for colors, radii, fonts, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a fix targeting an unauthorized error on the Settings page, defining two existing features: guarding the Settings page UI and the useAccountSettings hook against unauthenticated backend calls.
